## 📝 Pull Request Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what your PR accomplishes. E.g., "Add 5 new Senior Next.js App Router questions" or "Fix SM-2 E-Factor calculation edge case" -->

### 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] 💡 New Interview Question(s) (`feat(question)`)
- [ ] ✨ New Feature / UI Enhancement (`feat`)
- [ ] 🐞 Bug Fix (`fix`)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] 🧪 Automated Test Suite (`test`)
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / Chore (`chore`)

---

## ✅ Verification & Strict Standards Checklist

Before submitting this pull request, please confirm you have met our mandatory standards (`AGENTS.md`):

- [ ] **Strict TypeScript**: Ran `pnpm -r run typecheck` across all packages and produced zero errors (no `any`, no `@ts-ignore`).
- [ ] **Unit / Application Tests**: Ran `pnpm --filter @onluyenphongvan/backend run test` and all suites passed.
- [ ] **Clean Architecture**: Maintained separation between `domain/`, `application/`, and `infrastructure/` layers.
- [ ] **Question Explanation**: If adding questions, verified every question has a thorough, educational Markdown explanation.

---
